user.title: Waveshare UPS HAT (D)
user.description: Configure I2C bus and addresses for the UPS HAT (D).

error.invalid_bus: Enter an I2C bus number of 0 or greater.
error.invalid_interval: Update interval must be 5 seconds or higher.
error.invalid_address: Enter a valid 7-bit hexadecimal I2C address (e.g. 0x2D).
